summary: No ship: the exclusive-create path prevents two creators, but losers can still acquire if they read the just-created lock before its JSON payload is fully written.

findings.title: Fresh acquisition can still double-grant on an empty or partially written lock file
findings.recommendation: After `EEXIST`, do not treat an unreadable/null lock as free. Return WAIT/retry for unreadable existing lock files, or write to a temp file then atomically link/rename so readers never observe an empty/partial lock as acquirable. Add a regression that makes the existing lock path unreadable/partial during concurrent acquisition and asserts the second acquirer does not receive `acquired:true`.
